matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 2 > Royal Ontario Museum

node.name: Royal Ontario Museum
node.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 1 > Art Gallery of Ontario

node.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
node.description: Explore Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a Frank Gehry-designed building.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 2 > Casa Loma

node.name: Casa Loma
node.description: Historic castle featuring secret passages, gardens, and panoramic views.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 3 > Distillery District

node.name: Distillery District
node.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets and artisan shops.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 1 > St. Lawrence Market

node.name: St. Lawrence Market
node.description: Start your day at this iconic market, where you can grab a breakfast of famed peameal bacon sandwiches from Carousel Bakery.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 1 > CN Tower

node.name: CN Tower
node.description: Visit one of the world's tallest towers and enjoy panoramic city views from the observation deck.

node.name: Rivoli
node.description: Live music venue showcasing jazz, indie, and emerging artists.
